author: cfutons_mobile/refinery
text: Restored generate.ts (photo-to-3D via Tripo/Meshy) lost during rebase. Pipeline is now complete end-to-end: generate → convert → validate → sync. All 40 pipeline tests pass, 1345 total tests pass. npm scripts added: pipeline:generate, pipeline:convert, pipeline:validate, pipeline:sync, pipeline:all. Bead ready to close — full pipeline infrastructure in place. Actual model generation requires API keys + product photos in photos/ directory.
